title: End-to-end arbitrary-source operator proof bundle
problem: Staged mock spine and manual synthnote paths prove individual steps or dual-rank orchestrator counts, but operators lack one mock-only, machine-readable proof bundle that answers whether source intake through export produced usable research output. Principal audit post-ticket-265 drift warning calls for product-facing work; staged rank candidate-id docs thread (263–265) is closed.
acceptance_criteria: Mock LLM only; temp or scratch --db; no default graph DB writes unless existing protocol requires seed fixtures in isolated temp path.

Operator CLI path runs ingest/source registration through extract-claims, link-concepts, build-relationships, detect-contradictions, reconcile-scores, generate-run-report, and export-public (fixture-mode to temp export dir) for the primary staged rank-1 source.

Writes a machine-readable proof bundle JSON summarizing source_id, claim_count, concept_link_count, relationship_count, qualification_count, reconcile result, report_path, and export/card paths when available.
Proof bundle includes explicit status, pipeline_mode, and failure detail when any step fails.
Unit tests assert proof bundle schema, happy-path counts aligned with staged fixture spine, and failure clarity without live_network.
Public site build passes only if public export/site files changed.
non_goals: Live LLM in orchestrator, reconcile, or report.
Bare research run without fixture/staged flags.
rollback_plan: Remove operator_proof_bundle module, CLI entry, and unit tests; revert staged run hook if added.
